title: May 29th, 2021 (2)
body:
- professional
    - lost in the woods trying to find a way lyrics
        - lost in the woods trying to find a way
        - can't go back home yet but this is no place to stay
        - so i'm looking for a next step
        - something better suited for me to rest at
        - the problem is is i'm tired
        - but i can't stop cuz i'm wired differently
        - dig in, i'll set the whole thing on fire
        - definitely
        - and that isn't me
        - anymore
        - i let my little arson out before i even st[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]ed exploring larceny
        - it lit up the wrong p[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]]s of me
        - or rather the brighter the fire made my margins harder to see
        - the shadows got darker then
        - in the middle of battle again lines look starker then
        - losing hurts less when it seems hard to win
        - danger seems further when you need a spark again
        - crossing wires cuz you need to st[[[[[[[[art]]]]]]]] your car and can't find your keys makes perfect sense
